## FactoryResultMap class

A factory which lazily creates a [ResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.resultmap.md) from either an existing map or an array of entries.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class FactoryResultMap<TKey extends string = string, TValue = unknown> implements IReadOnlyResultMap<TKey, TValue> 
```
**Implements:** [IReadOnlyResultMap](./ts-utils.ireadonlyresultmap.md)<!-- -->&lt;TKey, TValue&gt;
